word: G1751 - ἔνειμι - éneimi - en'-i-mee - Such things as … have

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Such things as … have
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1722 and G1510; to be within (neuter participle plural): - such things as . . . have. See also G1762.
